title: It's Not Just You: YouTube's Picture-in-Picture Isn't Working
summary: While there are ways to manually trigger PiP, it's best on mobile, as most video player apps have adopted a natural method: When you play a video, you can simply leave the app, and the video continues playing in a PiP window.
caption: output/2026-07-20/it-s-not-just-you-youtube-s-picture-in-picture-isn-t-working.txt
